record.field: ONLYOFFICE Docs is a self-hosted online office suite for editing documents, spreadsheets, presentations and PDFs in the browser, with real-time co-authoring.

ONLYOFFICE Docs is a self-hosted online office suite for editing documents, spreadsheets, presentations and PDFs in the browser, with real-time co-authoring.

Also known as ONLYOFFICE Document Server, it is a single-container editing engine that renders and edits Office formats with high fidelity to DOCX, XLSX and PPTX. It is most often plugged into a file platform such as Nextcloud, ownCloud or Seafile so users can open and co-edit their documents directly from the browser, but it also works standalone as a collaborative document server. Because everything runs on your own infrastructure, sensitive files never leave your servers.

Key features
  • Full document, spreadsheet and presentation editors with strong DOCX/XLSX/PPTX compatibility
  • View, edit, fill and convert PDF files right in the browser
  • Real-time co-authoring with track changes, comments, mentions and version history
  • Ready-made connectors for Nextcloud, ownCloud, Seafile, Confluence, WordPress and many more
  • JWT-secured API so only authorized document management systems can start editing sessions
  • Runs entirely on your own server, keeping documents inside your infrastructure
Best for

Ideal as the online editing engine behind a file platform like Nextcloud, ownCloud or Seafile, or as a standalone document server for teams that need Office-compatible collaborative editing on their own infrastructure. Plan for at least 4 GB RAM and always front it with HTTPS and JWT enabled.

services: onlyoffice-docs: image: onlyoffice/documentserver:latest environment: - JWT_ENABLED=true - JWT_SECRET={{ JWT_SECRET }} volumes: - ./onlyoffice_data:/var/www/onlyoffice/Data - ./onlyoffice_log:/var/log/onlyoffice - ./onlyoffice_lib:/var/lib/onlyoffice - ./onlyoffice_db:/var/lib/postgresql healthcheck: test: - CMD-SHELL - curl -f http://127.0.0.1/healthcheck || exit 1 interval: 30s timeout: 10s retries: 5 start_period: 60s container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' restart: unless-stopped ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:80' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
Shared secret used to sign the JWT tokens exchanged between ONLYOFFICE Docs and the document management system that embeds it. Paste the same value into the connector (e.g. Nextcloud).
